content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 9, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 9, 2026, focused on enhancing the framework's modularity and developer experience. The primary achievement was the introduction of a new `agent` workspace to streamline repository startup, alongside significant updates to core runtime-composition APIs.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Agent Workspace and Repository Bootstrapping**
* Introduced a new `agent` workspace to simplify the repository startup process ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).
* Implemented multi-language support within the new workspace, including Python and Rust configurations ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).

**Runtime Composition and API Updates**
* Updated core runtime-composition APIs to allow `loadCharacters` to accept file paths and configuration options ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).
* Refactored workspace dependencies and scripts to support the new modular structure, impacting `scripts`, `plugins`, and core `typescript` packages ([#6702](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6702)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#6712](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6712): feat(core): group addressee routing and anti-loop prompt guidance.

## CLOSED ISSUES
* None.

## NEW ISSUES
* None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
